description: There are a large number of built-in gags, such as, for example, the choice of different user agents, scraping settings, and so on. So try Netpeak Spider, and you will like it.
author: Olga H.
pros: With Netpeak Spider, I often analyze my portals and competitors' portals. I like the fact that Netpeak Spider works with a large number of pages, and it already has a large number of already pre-installed filters, by which you can identify significant errors. Also, I can single out: the first is that I can start crawling on my computer, then save this project and transfer it to some working, more advanced, cooler computer. Multi-windowing is cool, I can crawl several sites at the same time. In addition, very cool dashboards are made, I have not seen this among any competitors. Power thing is that you can immediately see all the errors there, all the necessary parameters on one dashboard.
cons: After the last update, JavaScript rendering has become available, but we still need the function to save some rendered code that was rendered using JS.

review_title: Powerful website crawler with superb UI
description: Netpeak Spider is a solid part of my SEO toolbox. I love using it, it makes for fast and effective work.
author: Dan H.
pros: I love Netpeak Spider. The UI is clean and good to work with. What's probably best is the superb way you can handle huge spreadsheets of data. You can do any filtering, segmenting etc. you can think of. Want to see just the data that matters on your screen? No problem, there is either a pre-configured filter or you can configure one yourself. You can save all your crawl setting, filter settings etc. making repetitive tasks fast and easy. Export anything you like. Import external data: Whatever other data sources you have, just import them and use their filtering tools to get just the data on the screen that you really need.
cons: GA, GSC and Yandex integration is built in, but no direct integration of MOZ, Majestic etc. data. You have to use another app, "Netpeak Checker", or export from those tools and import a CSV file. I'd also appreciate a visualization of Internal Page Rank findings and of the URL structure.

description: I thoroughly recommend this SEO bot for your arsenal of search engine tools. It's great for keeping a check on SEO data and potential crawl issues. The free trial means there's no risk either if it turns out to not be suitable.
author: Jonny C.
pros: As far as bot-crawlers go, this software has pretty much all you could want from getting a full technical overview of your website. It breaks down every potential SEO area of interest in detail, as well as categorising these into warnings and errors, allowing you to prioritise fixes. The crawls itself are flexible in how they are performed, and allow you to set rules such as ignoring canonicals and meta robots rules, which is useful if you want to either simulate a search engine crawler or get site-wide information. The full access trial means you can try it out and see if it's for you, which is great as we ended up purchasing the software.
cons: There are very few cons. It perhaps lacks the illustrative displays of crawls that other software does, but otherwise I can't fault. Can also be quite RAM intensive, but this is common across crawling software.

description: Great tool, good pricing, a lot of flexibility. They combined package with Netpeak Checker is definitely worth considering too for more flexibility and features.
author: Bram V.
pros: Netpeak Spider is a versatile tool that offers many handy features. When combined with Netpeak Checker, it offers a huge amount of flexibility and a lot of data. The scraping functionality is particularly interesting and is a lot more extensive than most similar crawlers seem to offer. After a good month or two using the tool, there are still various different features I need to test. When it comes to data analysis and filtering, it offers various built-in filters and segmentation options and is fairly easy to use once you get the hang of it. Got the tool on AppSumo, but even when purchased directly on their site, it's priced competitively.
cons: It has a large overlap with other technical SEO tools. It's priced competitively and offers some unique features that other tools don't offer, so it's definitely worth it for technical SEOs. However, if you're not going to use those features (like scraping capabilities, extra analysis using Netpeak Checker + integrations, adding custom data/filters/analysis etc.) then you might be better off sticking to the site crawler provided in your standard SEO tool suite.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Simple to use, easy to configure, uncomplicated to segment what I need to see, and reports are awesome. Also, Customer Service is great!
author: Neil D.
pros: Good and fast helper, which signaling me about any SEO or usability errors. So I know where it has to be improved. Also, I like the opportunity to save projects, not just settings. Plus, it's great to be able to transfer it to another computer, or to export reports to my Google Drive. That's why I prefer Netpeak Spider to other tools.
cons: Doesn’t offer a lifetime license. You can only purchase a subscription and pay each month or annually. It makes me feel like I'm paying a loan.

review_title: You may encounter major SEO issues.
description: The ability to copy matrices from console tabs and use slicer in the report are useful features.You can quickly and easily schedule automated SEO audits and web crawl tasks using the tool's easy-to-use built-in calendar.You can create and configure as many projects as you want, save them and keep track of their complete histories.Project audit results and SEO data can be compared over time to spot patterns and compare changes.Reports on website SEO audits can be produced using interactive graphs, tables and diagrams.
author: Enma J.
pros: While looking for duplicate sites and information, Netpeak is a great tool.With a breakdown of our website's structure into URL segments, I can do a thorough examination.I can only arrange the site as a whole to be scanned for particular characteristics.It enables me to send reports by email and Telegram, examine them on a secure online portal, and export them to PDF.
cons: In comparison to the competitors, Netpeak Software's subscription costs are expensive.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: I have many tasks, and I shift many of them to Netpeak Spider. It saves time looking for broken links and pages with SSL certificate problems. I like the user-friendly interface, the speed of work – this is the fastest product on the market and the only software I use for technical audit.
author: Valeria B.
pros: I like that Netpeak Spider does not use all the RAM, like its analogs.
cons: I would like to have more visual reports and interactive dashboards. This is how a large bunch of information is perceived better.

description: With Netpeak Spider I am usually improving internal linking, getting full site structure, detecting and optimizing old blog posts, which don’t bring traffic.
author: Olga F.
pros: I really appreciate Netpeak Spider's working speed and amounts of data it can process.
cons: I would like to have more visualization, like site structure for example.

description: I use Spider to quickly crawl my project or specific lists of pages.
author: 🇺🇦Daryna L.
pros: I like its speed of work and easy interface.
cons: I'd really like to be able to open 2 projects side by side and have some mapping functionality.

review_title: White Label And PDF Reporter Tool For SEOs White Label And PDF Reporter Tool For SEOs
description: Using the tool, I do: 1) PDF reports with checks for my clients (they can contain everything that my clients want, for example, finding broken links, redirecting, calculating PR, or even a report about what I did with the website). And the advantage is that I do it in a few minutes (I mean the report - the spider generates it in 5 minutes or less) 2) Then I mark this report in PDF format under the colors of my brand and place my contact details using the report option with a white label (this is very important! I save my time and earn more money only because I tell customers that I do my reports hands, but actually the spider does it instead of me. This automation allows you to do in-depth SEO analysis (it's better than trying to prepare data in Google Shits, right?)
author: Ostap Y.
pros: I was always interested in the new areas of digital marketing, a couple of months ago I had a new hobby - SEO freelancing, and I was looking for a spider tool for SEO audit with perfect working options for the white label. I found Netpeak Soft that covers all my needs. I do SEO reports in PDF format for my clients with my contact information (this is similar to a brand report that I can do with the Spider tool). And I like this feature the most
cons: I just started my experience with the tool, so I can’t note the worst thing in the tool. However, I would like to implement mirror checking for start URLs if they are not available
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: So easy and quick to scan the site, analyze the reference weight, the weight of the page, and export scan results for technical audit. Especially I like the selection of links with errors and quick transition to the page of the site in the browser.
author: Anton B.
pros: The best thing about Netpeak Spider for me – I easily replaced all other tools with one. Plus, it works and does better audit than others.
cons: No Mac version. It's a bit disappointing. However, I know that Netpeak Software is working on a new tool for macOS.

review_title: Good crawler for technical audit; I used this crawler for pre-sale too.
description: Audit, pre-sale, consulting.
author: Victor K.
pros: I like its user-friendly interface but most of all I like user-friendly support team ;) They know answers for any of my questions and I so thankful for that! I know that it's not an easy thing to build a good software, but they really did it! 5/5, guys!
cons: I haven't trouble with this software, all was good.

review_title: You may know nothing about your SEO
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Netpeak Spider finds dozens of extremely important issues and also has nice UX
cons: I wish it had a free plan, 14 days is too less
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Affordable and high performance SEO Program
description: I was satisfied with the product. I would definitely recommend it to anyone. It's affordable with great features.
author: Akif K.
pros: I liked the simple and understandable interface of Netpeak Checker.
cons: Netpeak Spider could be a bit faster though
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: I've had a good experience with Netpeak Spider.
author: Caroline O.
pros: I like that I'm able to see broken links, links with no title tags. Imagine going through your website manually and doing this! Such a time-saver!
cons: I can't think of any disadvantages of using Netpeak Spider!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Reliable and efficient web scraping tool
description: Usually, I use Spider to analyze our company website or spy on our competitors.
author: Vikas B.
pros: One of the standout features of Netpeak Spider is its ability to crawl websites and collect valuable data quickly and efficiently. With just a few clicks, I can scrape websites for valuable insights such as broken links, duplicate content, missing meta descriptions, and more. This allows me to quickly identify areas for improvement and take action to improve website's performance.
cons: No Cloud-Based option. Netpeak Spider is a desktop-based application. This may not be ideal for some that require a cloud-based solution for remote access or collaboration.

description: Netpeak Spider helps me to conduct daily audits. Compared to competitors, speed is currently the main strong point.
author: Ekaterina K.
pros: The program is made for an audit and immediately shows reports on problems: in some places they are directly mega-useful, simple, and quite understandable. I recommend.
cons: It's not a multi-user tool, so if I want to use it on another computer, I have to get another access.

description: The software helps me every day, and I use it regularly. This is a search for duplicates in headings and descriptions - these are the most significant mistakes what you need for seo-optimizer. In the last update, it began to fly, to work quickly, everything is clear intuitively, you can even rendering JS! Well done guys, know how to do software.
author: Sergei K.
pros: I like Spider in all respects because it’s a great alternative to what it was before. It helps me to reduce a lot more time in my work to find errors on websites, look for any corrections and the like.
cons: You always need to refine something. To make it work even faster, 4-5 times - it would be a bomb. And so, if you come up with any updates, chips that will help us, we are always for, we will always be happy to see the update software.

review_title: It’s a must have for your SEO toolbox
description: It’s the best value for money solution so far.
author: Gennadiy S.
pros: It checks everything from meta tags to internal link weight distribution. It has intuitive interface and lots of small features that improve the user experience. You can interact with every single URL in the main table if you want to recrawl it, see all incoming links it has, open it in external services like mobile-friendly test etc.
cons: For now, it doesn’t crawl JavaScript, but as the support told me they are working on it. Haven’t noticed any other cons.

review_title: Cozy SEO Spider For Spying On Competitors' SEO Strategies
description: As net spider is the tool for seeking SEO issues on websites (we've already found ours), we also can spy on what's going on with competitors' SEO by crawling their sites and analyzing what's link juice of their sites (what're the most profitable pages or how they optimize the website at all), analyzing external linking as well - then we can rebuild our website to the analogy of competitors and thanks to linkbuilding strategy we can get a higher ranking. That's the huge benefit we've found working with the net spider tool.
author: Dmytro B.
pros: To be ahead of competitors, you should be the stop above them, and here's net spider help us - we analyze our competitors' SEO strategies, blog posts, well-organized websites pages (that bring them a lot of traffic and lead), and implement it on our business. The best thing in the tool - it has fast speed, you can crawl any websites without proofing you're admin, and you can export all your results in Google Drive (very comfortable)
cons: I dislike device management. Sometimes I need to collab with several specialists from my team, and for all of them, we need to buy licenses (even if they don't need to crawl). It would be better to have 2-3 devices access under 1 license (I prefer to pay a little bit more instead of buying 2-3 different access)
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Check your site before you wreck your site
description: All the way around, it’s a very good SEO crawler showing great performance for a reasonable price.
author: Yevhen S.
pros: This software allows checking on-site SEO factors that are vital if you want to rank high in Google or other search engines. It crawls all pages of your site and finds lots of issues you need to fix. Spider makes it easy to find all broken links, duplicate pages, issues with redirects, canonicals, and pagination. All parameters like Maximum external links can be changed so you can customize them every time Google updates its algo or you change your strategy.
cons: Some features such as scraping or internal Page Rank need extra knowledge to be used to the full. It would be much easier to be able to use templates for scraping so I don’t need to spend time searching for regular expression which extracts phone numbers.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Overall, I’m pretty satisfied with the tool. The team develops it by leaps and bounds adding new features and fixing bugs. I bought a yearly license and they’ve already made some major improvements making this tool even better for the initial price.
author: Taras B.
pros: Besides the fact it’s fast, I like the level of customization. I can set all crawling parameters myself and avoid wasting time and RAM on those I don’t need. Filtering in the results table is extremely helpful, the tool creates another tab for filtered results so you can work on a certain issue without changing the main table. What’s more, you can choose it as a segment and have a detailed look at it.
cons: Haven’t found any major cons yet. Though note that it may be quite resource demanding as it’s a desktop crawler.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I believe Netpeak Spider is the best price/value SEO crawler.
author: Vlada F.
pros: When I first saw the tool I was quite shocked by the variety of features and parameters. Being a person with not much technical experience, it took me a month to master this tool with the support of managers. After using it for some time I can outline the main advantages I found: 1. It’s fast and it doesn’t burn my computer. 2. It finds all issues I need and even more. 3. The interface becomes pretty intuitive if you use it for some time (though at the start you may need help). 4. It has a bunch of additional features like scraping and page rank calculation.
cons: I honestly haven’t faced any cons yet. As a suggestion, I’d like to have more video tutorials for newbies like me.

review_title: Top-notch crawler for on-page and technical SEO
description: I’ve used a bunch of different SEO tools, and Netpeak Spider stands out among its competitors. It gives you all essential insights into your on-page SEO and presents data in a user-friendly way.
author: Mariya S.
pros: What I like most about Netpeak Spider is that I can customise it for each task specifically. I’ve created several templates which include certain settings and parameters for different tasks so I don’t need to change the configuration every time I have to crawl the site as a Googlebot, work with internal linking, or just check meta tags. Such crawlers have lots of settings and it’s extremely easy to mess up, that’s why I like this feature.
cons: Lacks integration with Google Analytics & anti-captcha needed.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: I do SEO audits on a daily basis, thus Netpeak Spider is one of the main tools for me. 20-25% of data collected exactly using this tool. I was hesitating before purchasing it, but right after the demonstration of their software, I had no doubts that it's the exact tool for me.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I like its user-friendly interface but most of all I like user-friendly support team ;) They know answers for any of my questions and I'm so thankful for that! I know that it's not an easy thing to build good software, but they really did it! 5/5, guys!
cons: I would like to see a lifetime license. I just hate subscriptions... That's my own thing, sorry. But also I would like to add some new parameters from external services to Spider.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
